tapps-mcp.instructions: Code quality scoring (0-100 across 7 categories), security scanning (Bandit + secret detection), quality gates (pass/fail against configurable presets), documentation lookup, domain expert consultation, and project profiling for Python projects.

tapps-brain.instructions: Persistent cross-session memory served by the DEPLOYED tapps-brain HTTP adapter (container tapps-brain-http on agentforge_agentforge-net). Tenant: project_id=tapps-brain (registered via `tapps-brain project register` on 2026-04-17, repo-brain profile). Tools: memory_save/memory_search/memory_recall/memory_consolidate/memory_delete + hive sharing via agent_scope. agent_id=claude-code-wtthornton.
